category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vfkit as a command-line hypervisor using Apple's Virtualization Framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vfkit; source_facts.homepage points to the official vfkit project repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states command-line hypervisor and Apple's Virtualization Framework; source_facts.executables lists vfkit as a CLI executable.
